name: Stret Sweper
description: The Stret Sweper is a double-barrel shotgun that boosts pellet count at the expense of accuracy. Each trigger pull consumes two shotgun rounds, so ammo drains fast unless you have regeneration or a larger Shotgun SDU. Compared with other double-barrel models, it is even less accurate but typically comes with a bigger magazine.
notes: Dropped at random from any appropriate loot source.
